title: Thumbnail parity fixtures
locked_current_owner: Python upload/import thumbnail generation through optional Pillow

post_api_upload_thumbnail_only_success: original upload is not retained when thumbnail generation succeeds
post_api_upload_thumbnail_failure_fallba: when thumbnail generation is unavailable, thumbnail_only does not delete or invent a thumbnail
original upload is retained as the safe fallback
current Python response keeps thumbnail_only=true, returns the original URL, and leaves filename null
post_api_upload_url: thumbnail_only=true returns only the thumbnail path on success
original remote image is not retained on successful thumbnail_only
import_image_helper: thumbnail_only deletes original only after thumbnail generation succeeds
thumbnail generation failure keeps the original image
cleanup_and_delete: POST /api/upload/delete removes the original and _thumb.webp companion
orphan cleanup treats _thumb.webp as referenced when its original image is referenced
static_contract_locks: routes/upload.py saves WEBP thumbnails with quality=80
routes/notes/import_.py saves WEBP thumbnails with quality=80
go-shadow/go.mod still has no Go WebP encoder dependency

not_authorized_by_23_8_thumb_2: Implement Go upload or thumbnail routes
Remove Python PIL imports or fallback behavior
Write production static/uploads or docs/attachments files

allowed_next_step.title: Pillow removal gate
allowed_next_step.summary: Evaluate whether Pillow can be removed only after dependency decision, parity fixtures, Go thumbnail candidate implementation, packaging smoke, and docs/script/requirements sync criteria are satisfied.
